title: John Wright | EECS at UC Berkeley
content: John Wright | EECS at UC Berkeley John Wright: Faculty Home Page Larger Photo John Wright Assistant Professor Contact Information jswright@berkeley.edu Links Personal Homepage Research Support Amy Frithsen frithsen@berkeley.edu Biography My research is in theoretical computer science, with an emphasis on quantum computing. More specifically, I work on quantum state learning, quantum complexity theory, property testing, and approximation algorithms. Before joining UC Berkeley, I was at UT Austin, MIT and Caltech. I received my Ph.D. from Carnegie Mellon University, where I was advised by Ryan O'Donnell. I received my B.Sc. in computer science from UT Austin. Education 2016, Ph.D., Computer Science, Carnegie Mellon University Research Areas Theory (THY) Research Centers Simons Institute for the Theory of Computing (SITC) Selected Honors and Awards Sloan Research Fellow , 2026 IEEE CS TCPAMI Young Researcher Award , 2015
